speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki agle mahine ki home loan EMI ka intezam karna hi hoga
text: Aaj subah termination email aaya aur mere hosh ud gaye, par rone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki agle mahine ki home loan EMI ka intezam karna hi hoga. UPSC coaching ke liye Papa ne kisan hokar apni zameen girvi rakhi thi, isliye main thak kar baith nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty and role frame first to validate the Seeker's burden.
text: Tumhare upar abhi itni badi zimmedari hai EMI aur Papa ki zameen ki, ki tumhe lag raha hai rone ya rukne ki ijazat hi nahi hai tumhein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere liye breakdown ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta, mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah naya raasta dhoondna hai taaki ghar ki izzat bachi rahe. Itne saalon ki mehnat bekar nahi ja sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and weight of the effort to validate exhaustion.
text: Itne saalon se tum lagatar mehnat kar rahe ho, bina ruke, taaki sab kuch theek rahe, aur abhi bhi ek aur nayi shuruat karni padegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur agar main abhi ruk gaya toh sab khatam ho jayega. Papa ne kitni umeedon se zameen girvi rakhi thi meri padhai ke liye, main unhe kya munh dikhaunga?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently probe the fear of disappointing the family without shifting from the Seeker's reality.
text: Jab tum yeh sochte ho ki Papa ko kya bolna padega, toh us waqt andar se kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut darr lagta hai. Aisa lagta hai jaise ek bojh hai chhati par. Main fail nahi ho sakta, warna gaon mein log unhe jeene nahi denge. Izzat ka sawal hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence regarding the family's honor.
text: Aisa mehsoos ho raha hai ki tumhari ek chhoti si rukawat bhi gaon mein parivar ki izzat par sawal utha sakti hai, aur yeh soch tumhe andar se daba rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri apni koi life nahi hai
text: Wahi toh. Kabhi kabhi toh lagta hai meri apni koi aukaat ya life hi nahi hai, bas ek loan chukane ki machine ban kar reh gaya hoon. Par kisi ko bolunga toh log kahenge beta na-shukra hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a shorter restatement and soft pause.
text: Logon ke taane aur na-shukra kehlaye jaane ka darr tumhe yeh sab akele jhelne par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main sach mein bahut akele aur andar se thak gaya hoon. EMI ka din paas aa raha hai aur samjh nahi aa raha ki sab kaise sambhalunga bina naukri ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the exhaustion underneath the duty-based coping pattern.
text: Lagta hai ki is duty aur EMI ke dabaav ne tumhe gehri tarah se thaka diya hai, EXHAUSTION itni zyada hai ki ab aage ka raasta dhundhla lagne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe ho. Par chahe thakawat ho ya na ho, duty toh karni padegi. Middle class ladko ke paas haar manne ka koi option thodi hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the structural reality of the Hindi belt middle class without toxic positivity.
text: Middle class parivaron mein, khaas kar hamari jagahon par, ladkon ko sikhaya hi yahi jata hai ki unki keemat unke kamane se hai. Tumhara yeh bojh mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai, tumhari mehnat ki value ek naukri jaane se kam nahi ho jati.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad. Par reality yahi hai ki bank wale aur society nahi samjhte meri value. Unhe sirf paisa chahiye. Us termination letter ne mujhe tod diya hai andar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote to normalize the Seeker's experience in their cultural context.
text: Humare yahan, bade sapne dekhne walon ke saath achanak aisi rukawat aana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki izzat ka masla beech mein aa jata hai aur sab chupchap dabte rehte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah naya raasta dhoondna hai
text: Sahi baat hai, par ab kya karoon? Agle hafte ki EMI aur naye job ki tension se dimaag phat raha hai. Koi raasta hai kya jisse thoda dimaag shant ho sake?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide structural normalization about the financial pressure.
text: Achanak se jab income rukti hai aur karz saamne hota hai, toh dimaag ka phatna aur overwhelm hona ek dam natural response hai, yeh system hi aise bana hai ki hume panic mein daal de.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah
text: Toh fir is panic ko handle kaise karoon taaki main focus kar sakun agli naukri dhoondne mein? Abhi toh resume dekh kar hi rona aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2-3 manageable suggestions that don't add to the Seeker's obligations.
text: Abhi ke liye do chhoti cheezein kar sakte hain. Ek, agle 2 ghante ke liye laptop band kar do aur sirf paani peekar ek jagah baith jao. Doosra, apni bank policy mein 'EMI moratorium' ya grace period ka provision online check kar lo, isse shayad 1-2 mahine ki mohlat mil jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Grace period... yeh main check kar sakta hoon online. Par dimaag itna bhari hai ki laptop kholte hi ghabrahat hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk the Seeker through the execution of one specific, small step.
text: Pehle ek lamba saans lo... phir sirf phone pe bank ka naam aur 'EMI grace period' search karo, bas itna hi aaj ke liye, resume baad mein dekh lenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay. Main abhi bank ki website pe dekhta hoon. Agar 1 mahine ka extension mil gaya toh thoda saans lene ka waqt mil jayega mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror back the newfound space and mild relief.
text: Ek mahine ki woh mohlat tumhe aage ki tayari ke liye woh thoda sa waqt de degi jo abhi itna zaroori lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas apne logon ko nahi bataunga
text: Haan, bas main ye baat abhi ghar pe nahi bataunga, warna maa ki tabiyat kharab ho jayegi. Wo log tension nahi le payenge itni.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma/secrecy cue with a softer restatement and pause.
text: Tum unhe bachane ke liye yeh bojh akele uthana chahte ho, taaki unki tabiyat pe asar na pade...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Zindagi me yahi seekha hai. Papa ne UPSC ka kharcha uthaya zameen rakh ke, ab meri baari hai sab clear karne ki chahe main jitna bhi thak jau.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe how the Seeker manages this responsibility practically while feeling exhausted.
text: Jab tum yeh sab khud par akele lene ka faisla karte ho, toh apni is thakawat ka khayal kaise rakhte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Waise hi jaisa maine shuru mein kaha tha... rone ka ya thakne ka waqt hi nahi milta. Bas ek deadline ke baad dusri aa jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror back the recurring coping shade about not having time to rest.
text: Ek samasya puri hoti nahi ki agli taiyar rehti hai, isliye waqt rukne ka moka deta hi nahi hai tumhe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par aapse baat karke thoda sa bojha halka zaroor hua hai. Ab lag raha hai ki 1-2 din ruk ke thoda plan kar sakta hoon naye job hunt ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their resilience and ability to pause.
text: Baat karke apni thakawat ko acknowledge karna bhi kaafi himmat ka kaam hota hai, aur yeh 1-2 din ka pause tumhara haq hai taaki tum agla kadam clearly soch sako.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Main abhi bank ki website aur apne network me kuch doston ko message karke dekhta hoon. Shayad kahi se koi lead mil jaye bina zyada panic kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide mild reassurance regarding networking under pressure.
text: Corporate market me layoffs aam hote jare hain, aur doston ke referrals aksar is mushkil waqt mein kaafi practical aur madadgaar sabit hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main apne kuch purane colleagues se bhi baat karunga kal. Bas yahi umeed hai ki Papa ki zameen aur ghar ki izzat dono surakshit rahein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror back their ongoing core duty-based priority.
text: Papa ka sammaan aur ghar ki suraksha tumhare liye aage badhne ka sabse bada motivation hai aaj.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek madhyam vargiya ladke ka yahi sach hai. Khair, main ab laptop band karke thodi der bahar walk ke liye jaata hoon jaise apne suggest kiya tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a simple supportive question to close the interaction comfortably.
text: Yeh walk ka idea bahut sahi lag raha hai, aage badhne se pehle koi aisi aur cheez hai jo mere sath abhi baat karni ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, abhi ke liye itna hi kaafi hai. Kuch der bina EMI aur pressure ke baare me soche saans lene ka try karta hoon. Shukriya aapka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating mirror to close the loop.
text: Chalo, is choti si walk mein bina kisi darr aur tension ke bas thodi der shanti mehsoos karne ki koshish karo.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon
text: Job chali gayi hai par main ghar walon ko nahi bata sakta kyunki unhone apni saari savings meri PSC prep aur is vehicle loan par laga di hain. Multi-year dropper hone ka stigma pehle hi tha, ab is financial distress mein mujhe double shift karke bhi paise jodne honge. Thakan itni hai ki sharir jawab de raha hai, par 'structural endurance' hi meri reality hai kyunki main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the immense weight of being the family's final hope to validate their duty-based coping.
text: Tum apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed ho, aur isiliye ye sab akele bardasht kar rahe ho bina unhe bataye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main dropper stigma face kar chuka hoon. Log pehle hi taane maarte the ki itne saal waste kar diye. Ab agar bataunga ki job bhi gayi, toh meri izzat bachegi hi nahi. Pura gav hasega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the duration of struggle and the fear of societal mockery due to the dropper stigma.
text: Itne saalon ki mehnat ke baad job ka jaana aur logon ke taano ka darr, yeh sach mein bahut bhari lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon
text: Bhari toh hai, par option kya hai? Unki savings wiped out ho chuki hain. Vehicle loan ka EMI next week due hai. Mujhe double shift leni hi padegi, chahe meri neend poori ho ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the mild risk and reflecting the feared consequence of failing the EMI.
text: Yeh sochna natural hai jab EMI samne ho. Tumhe lag raha hai ki agar double shift nahi ki toh EMI bounce hone ka dar aur ghar walo pe asar padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Aur main mummy-papa ko bata ke unki tension nahi badha sakta. PSC prep ke time par unhone apne saare sapne side rakh diye the mere liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore the emotional weight of protecting parents.
text: Unhe tension se bachane ke chakkar mein, tumhara apna mental space kaisa chal raha hai aaj kal?

text: Mental space ka toh socha hi nahi. Bas machine ki tarah kaam kar raha hoon. Structural endurance chahiye mujhe. Time hi kahan hai feel karne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional numbing out of duty.
text: Ekdum machine jaisa banna pad raha hai tumhe, taaki duty poori hoti rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, lekin sharir kab tak sath dega. Kal bhi night shift ke time chakkar aa gaye the, par paani pi ke wapas kaam pe lag gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the physical toll and duration of ignoring the body's signals.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exhausting toh hai. Lekin EMI ka message aata hai toh saari thakan bhool jani padti hai. Papa ki face yaad aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting to uncover deeper feelings behind the duty constraint.
text: Papa ka chehra yaad aate hi tum khud ki sari zarurat piche chhod dete ho, kya yeh humesha se aisa hi tha?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon
text: Jab se main PSC ki taiyari ke liye dropper bana, tab se responsibility aur badh gayi. Mujhe lagta hai sab kuch mere shoulders par hai. Ussi chakkar mein job ka pressure le raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unexpressed exhaustion of carrying the family's burden.
text: Lagta hai ki is sab ke beech ek gehra EXHAUSTION chup gaya hai, kyunki tumhe lagta hai rukne ka option hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Option nahi hai bhai. Main agar toot gaya toh ghar walon ka kya hoga? society waise hi mujhe failure maanti hai dropper hone ki wajah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Slowing down due to stigma cue, ending with a soft pause.
text: Bahut dar lagta hai ki agar tum ruko toh parivaar ka kya hoga aur log aur kya kahenge...

speaker: Seeker
text: Log toh bolenge hi, par main unka sahara hoon. PSC clear nahi hua toh kya, mehnat karke kamana padega. Par kabhi kabhi himmat toot jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the struggle as a cultural reality of aspirants carrying family hopes.
text: Tumhara yeh exhausting safar samajh aata hai; Hindi belt mein as a PSC aspirant poore ghar ki zimmedari aur vehicle loan uthana bohot himmat ka kaam hai, aur tumhari value is job status se badi hai.

speaker: Seeker

strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalise the hidden burden.
text: PSC aspirants ki duniya mein yeh financial pressure chhupana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki ghar ki izzat ka sawal hota hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter

text: Apne jazbaat ko rokk kar turant duty pe lautna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab kya karoon, raasta hi yahi hai mere paas. Thoda light lag raha hai bol ke, but ground reality change nahi hui.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about job loss context and debt.
text: Ek baat yaad rakhna, current market mein layoffs bahut aam baat ho gayi hai, yeh tumhari kshamata ka failure nahi hai balki structural issue hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad. Ab batao kya karoon next? Mujhe kal interview dena hai and energy bilkul nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, duty-aligned actionable steps for the seeker.
text: Kal ke liye sirf yeh do chijein try kar sakte ho: ek toh interview se pehle sirf 5 minute deep breathing karo bina EMI ke bare me soche, ya sirf pehla step decide karo ki kal subah breakfast karke hi nikalna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing try kar sakta hoon. Waise bhi dimag me bahut noise chal rahi hai aaj kal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen step clearly.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki alarm lagane ke baad phone side rakh do, aur bas 5 lambi saans lo… phir aaram se so jao… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, that sounds doable. Ghar ki umeed hoon, toh khud ko thoda toh chalana hi padega carefully.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming their sense of responsibility intertwined with the self-preservation insight.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their capacity to handle the crisis step by step.
text: Tumhari yeh jo kshamata hai akele loan aur parivaar ke stress ko face karne ki, woh tumhari real taqat hai as an aspirant.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks. Abhi main phone rakh ke breathing exercise karke sone ja raha hoon. Kal double shift ke liye uthna hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

text: Yeh 15 din ka countdown tumhare andar dubara se woh bechaini laa raha hai ki tab kya jawaab dena padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main kuch paise doston se udhaar lene ka soch raha hoon sirf agle mahine ki EMI bachaane ke liye, but mujhe aur karz nahi badhana.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe regarding debt and job loss to normalize structural hardship.
text: Market situations ki wajah se abhi layoffs bohot normal ho gaye hain, aur yeh achanak aaya financial gap tumhari kisi galti ka nateeja nahi hai, balki ek structural issue hai jiske liye khud ko itna blame karna theek nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap sahi keh rahe hain. Mujhe market ko blame na karke hamesha khud ko blame karne ki aadat ho gayi hai. Mujhe lagta hai sab mere failures hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the seeker's self-blame mechanism while keeping the focus on their core duty drive.
text: Tumhe darr rehta hai ki agar tum khud ko poori tarah zimmmedar nahi manoge, toh kahin tum apne family ko protect karne mein peeche na reh jao.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere maa-baap ne kabhi shikayat nahi ki, isliye mera khud pe thoda sa bhi reham khana mujhe selfish lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Encourage the seeker to think about the plan again, grounding them in the present.
text: Jab yeh selfish feel hone lagta hai library mein baithe, tab kal ka woh 1 ghanta time-block wala plan tumhe kaisa lagta hai us context mein?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe bas bina ruke kaam dhoondna hai
text: Plan toh zaroori hai. Selfish feel ho ya na ho, us ek ghante mein bina kisi emotion ke mujhe apply karna hi hoga. Practical rehna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforce their readiness to take the practical step.
text: Tum apni duty ko poora karne ke liye ab emotions ko thoda side rakh kar ek clear, practical route par chalne ke liye bilkul taiyar ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Bas aaj thoda aapse baat karke dimaag halka karna zaroori tha. Roz andar hi andar ghutan hoti thi library aane ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the importance of having shared this burden safely.
text: Itni badi zimmedari akele chup chap uthana sach mein ghutan bhara ho sakta hai, aur yeh bohot himmat ki baat hai ki aaj tumne ise baantne ka faisla kiya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Main abhi nikal raha hoon thodi der mein. Aaj ka din thoda aasan lag raha hai kal ki wajah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close the interaction warmly by mirroring their current calmer state.
text: Aaj is pal mein thodi raahat mehsus hona aage badhne ke liye achi shuruwat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main ab wapas padhai pe lagta hoon aur kal se ek ghanta apna naya routine follow karunga. Alvida.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End on a brief warm note of presence and support.
text: Ekdam theek. Yeh naya routine tumhare kaam aayega. Apna khayal rakhna, jab bhi zarurat ho tum yahan aakar baat kar sakte ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai
text: Subah email dekha aur ab dimaag fatne ko hai, par bache huye remittance se agle mahine ka kaam chalana hai aur bank ki kist bhi bharni hai. 5 saal se dropper hoon, isliye failure meri pehchaan ban gayi hai, par main haar nahi maan sakta kyunki sahukaar ka vyaj badhta ja raha hai. Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai, isliye main bas endure kar raha hoon taaki ghar ka chula chalta rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty and role frame without trying to solve the problem yet.
text: Tumhare shabdon se lag raha hai ki ghar ka chula jalana aur family ki zimmedari tumne apne kandhon par le rakhi hai, aur uske aage apni thakan ko bhi bhula dena padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, pichle paanch saal se yahi chal raha hai. Kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakta kyunki log kahenge ki itne saal se kar kya raha hai. Dropper tag toh mere maathe pe chhap gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the time duration and the stigma associated with being a dropper, responding to the stigma cue with a soft pause.
text: Paanch saal ka lamba waqt lagatar mehnat aur us par logon ke taano ka darr...

speaker: Seeker
text: Logon se zyada mujhe us sahukaar ki fikar hai. Uska vyaj din dugna ho raha hai. Maine socha tha is baar clear karke sab theek kar dunga, par wo email dekh kar umeed toot gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently probe the email mentioned since the Seeker brought it up twice, after two restatements.
text: Is email ne achanak se sab kuch aur bhari kar diya hai, usme aisi kya khabar thi jisne umeed tod di?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai
text: Ek aur attempt chala gaya. Result negative tha. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod doon aur bas gaon bhaag jaoon, lekin fir sochta hoon ki mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai. Karz kaun chukayega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the mild risk with normalising line and mirror the feared consequence.
text: Jab result kharab aata hai toh aisa lagna bahut normal hai ki sab chhod dein, aur ek taraf gaon lautne ka man karta hai, par dusri taraf parivaar pe karz girne ka darr wapas rok leta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Agar wapas gaya toh babuji ka kya hoga. Unhone khet girwi rakh kar mujhe yahan padhne bheja tha. Remittance se unko thodi madad mil jaati hai, par ab aage kya hoga samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational element (babuji and khet).
text: Yahan tumhare kandhon par sirf apna future nahi, balki babuji ki umeed aur khet ki fikr bhi tiki hui hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Unka chehra yaad aata hai toh rona aata hai, par rone ka time kahan hai mere paas. Agle mahine ki kist ki jugaad karni padegi kahin na kahin se part-time karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how they are managing the part-time aspect alongside studying.
text: Ye part-time kaam aur padhai dono eksaath manage karna tumhare upar kitna pressure daal raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Poocho mat. Raat ko neend nahi aati. Din me data entry aur raat me padhai. Aur itni mehnat ke baad bhi ye lagta hai ki main nakaam hoon. Meri koi value nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a soft, shorter restatement and pause. Also transitioning intensity to 3 allows Insight but keeping restatement here due to stigma.
text: Itni mehnat ke bawajood khud ko nakaam mehsoos karna bahut akela kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai
text: Haan, akelapan hai. Sab apne life me aage badh gaye, aur main yahan 5 saal se wahin atka hoon. Par koi na, mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai, kisi tarah kheench lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the exhaustion and fear of disappointing family typical for C4/C5 + Duty_Based.
text: Lagta hai is farz ko poora karte karte andar hi andar bahut gehri thakaan aa chuki hai, aur kahin na kahin gaon aur babuji ko niraash karne ka darr tumhe tod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahu toh haan. Main toot chuka hoon. Ek din off lene ka mann karta hai par lagta hai ek din kamaya nahi toh us sahukaar ke aadmi ghar pohanch jayenge. Ghar walo ki izzat ka sawal hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the cultural reality of sahukaar pressure and separate worth from the exam outcome.
text: Yeh darr bilkul samajh me aata hai; gaon me sahukaar ka vyaj aur parivaar ki izzat ka bhoj kisi ko bhi itna hi thaka dega, lekin yaad rakhna tumhara exam clear hona ya na hona tumhari mehnat aur niyat ko define nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mehnat toh bahut ki maine. Mujhe lagta tha sarkari naukri lag jayegi toh babuji ko kheti se aaram mil jayega. Ab unko kya bolunga main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote reflecting the aspirant world.
text: Aspirants ki life mein yeh burden bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabke upar ghar walo ka sapna aur karz ek sath chalta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Bahut akela feel hota tha. Abhi kist ka paisa jama karna hai aur padhai me dhyaan bilkul nahi lag raha. Batao kya karoon aage?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Give 2 small, duty-aligned options since readiness signal is present and intensity is 2.
text: Abhi dimaag itna thaka hua hai, isliye bade faisle lene ke bajaye do chote kaam kar sakte hain: pehla, sirf part-time ka schedule fix karein taki kist ki calculation clear ho jaye, ya dusra, ek din padhai ki kitabon ko side rakh kar bas apni need puri karein bina guilt ke. Konsa thoda feasible lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Need puri karna toh mushkil hai, guilt hota hai. Main part-time ka schedule aur kist ka hisab pehle clear kar leta hoon taki thoda stress kam ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step by step.
text: Pehle ek kagaz par part-time ki agli payment ki date likh lo... phir bank kist ka amount usme se alag karke dekho kitna bachta hai... bas itna hi aaj ke liye. Aage ka baad me sochenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ek diary mein likh leta hoon. Thoda figure clear hoga toh shayad raat ko theek se so paaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise the structural pressure of rural debt.
text: Aisa hi karna, kyunki rural debt aur gaon ka jo setup hai usme system ne interest ko itna badha diya hai ki ye akele tumhari kami nahi, balki mechanism ki pareshani ban jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki ghar ka chula chalta rahe
text: Lekin system ko kaun bataye. Mere ko hi pisna padega taaki ghar ka chula chalta rahe. Main figures likh kar kal babuji se ek baar baat karne ki koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational aspect of talking to babuji.
text: Babuji se seedhi baat karne ka khayal ek bahut bada kadam lag raha hai, jahan ghar ki aur aapki situation dono samne aayengi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yehi ummeed hai ki wo samajh jayein aur aur zyada tension me na aayein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the fear of consequence.
text: Dil mein kahin ye fikar bhi chal rahi hai ki unko bataane se kahin unki takleef aur na badh jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi baat hai, par ab batana zaroori hai. Maine kist ka hisab likh liya hai, thoda figure clear hai dimag me ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the proactive step.
text: Zimmedari uthate hue ab figures saamne aane se thoda toh clear lag raha hai aapko.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka lag raha hai ab sachme. Shukriya meri baat sunne ke liye, warna mere dimaag ka pressure cooker fat jata aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief and time element.
text: Subah se jo dimaag mein tension chal rahi thi, usko baant kar ab thoda chain mila hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main ab sohne ki koshish karta hoon thodi der. Raat me data entry bhi karni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Checking in on the immediate next step.
text: Aap aaram karne ke liye kuch khaas karoge jisse neend achi aaye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas aankh band karke thodi der apne maa ki yaad karunga. Unke hath ki chai yaad aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational comfort.
text: Maa ki yaad aur unke haath ki chai ka khayal hi ek ajeeb sa sukoon de jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, dhanyawad sunne ke liye. Kal babuji se bhi baat kar lunga time nikal ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validation of their resilience.
text: Itna bojh akele uthane ke baad bhi kal apne babuji se baat karne ki himmat rakhna, apne aap me bahut badi baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pathar ban kar khade rehna hai
text: Bhai, coaching institute ki side job se nikaal diya gaya hoon aur ab agle mahine ka EMI bounce hone ka pura khatra hai. Chit fund mein Papa ke paise doobne ke baad main hi sole earner hoon ghar ka. Par main thak kar baithne ka risk nahi le sakta, mujhe bas apne parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye pathar ban kar khade rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role/duty frame of having to be strong for the family
text: Tumhare upar itni badi zimmedari aa gayi hai ki tumhe lag raha hai apna sab kuch bhool kar sirf parivaar ke liye ek mazboot pahaad ban na padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, option hi kahan hai mere paas? Structural endurance dikhani hi padegi. Agar main thoda bhi kamzor pada, toh poora ghar bikhar jayega. Papa ka confidence waise hi shattered hai chit fund ke loss ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence if he fails to endure
text: Yeh darr poori tarah haavi hai ki agar tumne ek pal ki bhi saans li ya kamzori dikhai, toh jo kuch bacha hai wo bhi hath se nikal jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thak kar baithne ka risk nahi le sakta
text: Exactly. Log kehte hain apne baare mein socho, par kaun sochega mere baare mein? Main thak kar baithne ka risk nahi le sakta. Mard ko dard nahi hota wala scene nahi hai, bas afford nahi kar sakta dard feel karna abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect safely without pushing due to stigma cue
text: Is waqt dard mehsus karna bhi ek luxury lag rahi hai jo tum khud ko nahi de sakte...

speaker: Seeker
text: Luxury hi toh hai. Jab salary account mein aati hai aur agle din EMI aur ghar ke kharche mein 90% nikal jata hai, tab apna dukh yaad karne ka waqt kahan hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about his experience of this constant financial drain
text: Aisa cycle har mahine jab repeat hota hai, toh andar hi andar kaisa lagta hai yeh sab akele sambhalte hue?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pathar ban kar khade rehna hai
text: Kuch feel nahi hota ab. Pehle gussa aata tha Papa par, ki unhone chit fund mein kyu lagaya bina soche. Par ab bas calculation chalti hai dimaag mein. Main machine ban gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the loss of feelings and becoming a machine
text: Tumhari poori zindagi calculations aur ghar ki EMI ke ird-gird aise simat gayi hai ki ab bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hi aadat ban chuki hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan aur is mahine side job jaane se meri calculations puri hil gayi hain. EMI bounce hone ka matlab hai civil score kharab, penalty, aur relatives ke saamne izzat ka kachra.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence regarding respect
text: Lagta hai financial stress se zyada tumhe is baat ki chinta kha rahi hai ki society aur relatives ke aage parivaar ki izzat na gir jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Middle class gharon mein aur bachta hi kya hai paise ke alawa? Izzat aur shaan hi toh hoti hai. Agar woh bhi chali gayi, toh Papa toh shayad seh bhi nahi payenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how carrying the father's burden affects him
text: Aise mahaul mein, jahan Papa ki ummeed aur unka maan-samman sab aapke akele ke kandhon par hai, yeh sab carry karna kitna bhaari pad raha hai tumhare liye?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thak kar baithne ka risk nahi le sakta
text: Bahut bhaari lagta hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab kuch chhod kar kahin door chala jaun jahan koi expectations na ho. Par main woh bhi nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the mild risk feeling gently and normalise
text: Tumhare akele par itna bojh hai ki kabhi kabhi bhag jane ka khayal aana bohot swabhavik hai, lekin tumhara farz tumhe wapas waheen baandh deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere paas mental health ke liye waqt nahi hai. Kaam dhundhna padega side wala warna EMI sach mein bounce ho jayegi aur main yeh defeat nahi le paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the deep exhaustion and fear of disappointing family
text: Lagta hai ki is structural endurance ki koshish ke peeche ek gehri thakan aur apne hi parivaar ko nirash karne ka bahut bada darr chhipa hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot bada darr. Main unhe ek aur sadma nahi dena chahta. Sole earner hone ka yahi sabse bada trap hai, aap ro bhi nahi sakte chup ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the burden culturally
text: Jahan parivaar ki puri aarthik sthiti aapke ek income par tiki ho, wahan khud ko chup karke sab sehna common ho jata hai, par is thakan ka matlab yeh bilkul nahi ki tum koshish nahi kar rahe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pathar ban kar khade rehna hai
text: Koshish toh din raat kar raha hoon. Din bhar regular job, shaam mein coaching. Ab ek gayi toh doosri coaching dhundhni hogi warna cycle toot jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the condition of a sole earner covering up family debt
text: Aise achanak hue nuksaan wale gharon mein bada beta ban kar saara bojh akele uthana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab apni izzat bacha rahe hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sab dikhawa karte hain ki theek chal raha hai. Par andar se sab khokhla hai. Main practically drain ho chuka hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror time/duration aspect of the drain
text: Lagatar dikhawa karne aur bina ruke mehnat karne ne tumhe andar tak khali aur thaka hua mehsoos kara diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Khali toh hoon. Par theek hai, mujhe bas agle EMI cycle tak survive karna hai. Koi raasta hai kya dimaag ko shant rakhne ka is pressure ke beech?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Give quick, duty-compatible grounding options
text: Dimaag par itna bojh ho toh thoda ground karna zaroori hai. Tum chaho toh daily commute ke waqt 5 minute bina phone dekhe sirf saans par dhyan de sakte ho, ya fir sone se pehle din ki ek aisi choti cheez likh sakte ho jisne thodi rahat di ho. Tumhare schedule ko disturb nahi karenge yeh.

speaker: Seeker
text: Commute wala theek lag raha hai. Bus mein waise bhi baitha hi hota hoon aur faaltu thoughts aate rehte hain bounce hone ke bare mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the breathing exercise
text: Pehle bus mein apni seat par aankhein band kar lena... phir 4 second ke liye gehri saans lena, aur usay slowly 6 second tak chhodna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karke dekhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thak kar baithne ka risk nahi le sakta
text: Will try. Sirf dimag ko us failure loop se bahar nikalna hai mujhe taaki naya kaam dhundh saku.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the structural stress logically
text: Financial crisis jaise chit fund ka scam aksar poori families ka system hila deta hai; us structure ki wajah se job loss hone par pressure dugna ho jata hai, usme khud ko ek failure samajhna natural par galat hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pata nahi yar. Agar EMI ruki toh society mein log bolenge theek se sambhal nahi paya ladka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror fear of society's blame
text: Wahi baat wapas dimaag mein chal rahi hai ki kuch upar-neeche hua toh saara dosh society tumhare siron par daal degi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, lekin ab mujhe thoda realistic ho ke job portals dekhne honge kal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect readiness to move forward
text: Tum apne duties ki taraf practical approach ke saath fir se tayar ho rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pathar ban kar khade rehna hai
text: Pathar ban kar hi sahi, kisi ko toh sambhalna hoga. Papa ki umeedon par paani nahi fer sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his commitment while recognizing the weight
text: Tumhari apne parivaar ke prati yeh nishtha aur zimmedari uthane ki himmat waqai bahut badi baat hai, bhale hi rasta kathin ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah se thoda jaldi uthunga. Interview calls schedule karne padenge office se pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect focus on action plan
text: Abhi se kal ki subah ka plan set ho raha hai taaki din ki shuruat jaldi aur focus ke sath ho sake.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Bus mein breathing wali baat try karunga. Thanks for hearing me out. Thoda light lag raha hai baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Warm close, affirming his effort
text: Mujhe is baat ki khushi hai ki yahan thoda halka mehsoos hua; jab bhi baith kar akele thakawat mehsus ho, toh waise hi saans lena yaad rakhna. Apna khayal thoda sa zaroor rakhna is dauran.
